nde_context: I was in a car crash and thought I was dying.
nde_description: I left my body, saw a bright light, felt overwhelming peace, sensed time stop, and encountered a loving presence.
nde_aftereffects: Since then I try to do what is right, think about long-term consequences, consider others, help people, and forgive more easily.

nde_context: I collapsed suddenly and everything felt dangerous and chaotic.
nde_description: I felt terrified and confused. I did not see any light, presence, or peace, and I remained inside my body.
nde_aftereffects: Afterward I felt distressed and isolated. I did not become more forgiving, more helpful, or more focused on others.

nde_context: I had been ill for months and was frightened, but my family support gave me some hope.
nde_description: At first I panicked, then I felt calm. Time disappeared, but I did not leave my body, see any light, or notice a presence.
nde_aftereffects: I became more attentive to other people and more willing to help, but I still struggle with fear and do not think more about forgiveness or long-term consequences.
